query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users) AS totalUsers,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT userId) FROM puzzle_attempts WHERE userId IS NOT NULL) AS usersWithAttempts,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT deviceId) FROM puzzle_attempts WHERE userId IS NULL AND deviceId IS NOT NULL) AS guestDevices;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user p1iERkZxRv8XeMu.root --database EorxrxCPNFVtGo7gjBVrJr --execute 
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users) AS totalUsers,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT userId) FROM puzzle_attempts WHERE userId IS NOT NULL) AS usersWithAttempts,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT deviceId) FROM puzzle_attempts WHERE userId IS NULL AND deviceId IS NOT NULL) AS guestDevices;
